feature: GarudaX Admin Bot — AI-Powered Assistant with MCP + Ticket System
requirement: Develop GarudaX bot for admin portal. Use MCP server for tool access, GPT-nano for simple tasks, Claude CLI as orchestrator. Daily administration support, ticket system for customization and bug reports. Floating button UI in admin dashboard.

tasks.title: MCP server — GarudaX admin tools (TypeScript)
tasks.description:
Create an MCP server in TypeScript that wraps the GarudaX gateway admin APIs as MCP tools.

Create `src/admin-bot/mcp-server/` with:
1. `package.json` with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency
2. `tsconfig.json` for TypeScript compilation
3. `src/index.ts` — MCP server entry point using StdioServerTransport
4. `src/gateway-client.ts` — HTTP client for GarudaX gateway with JWT auth (auto-login with email/password, token refresh)
5. `src/tools/` — Tool definitions grouped by domain:
   - `health.ts`: get_system_health, get_service_status
   - `trading.ts`: halt_instrument, resume_instrument, get_circuit_breakers, mass_cancel
   - `margin.ts`: get_margin_calls, get_margin_stats, trigger_margin_calculation
   - `clearing.ts`: get_positions, get_netting
   - `settlement.ts`: get_settlement_cycles, trigger_settlement
   - `compliance.ts`: get_alerts, resolve_alert, file_sar, get_audit_trail
   - `participants.ts`: list_participants, approve_kyc, reject_kyc
   - `market_data.ts`: get_orderbook, get_ticker, get_last_trade
   - `warehouse.ts`: get_inventory, get_receipts
   - `risk.ts`: get_order_limits, update_order_limits
   - `reports.ts`: get_market_summary, get_large_traders
   - `fees.ts`: get_fee_schedule
6. `src/resources/` — MCP resources:
   - `system_status.ts` — current health + halted instruments
   - `active_alerts.ts` — unresolved compliance alerts

Include `.mcp.json` at project root for Claude CLI integration.

Config via env: GARUDAX_GATEWAY_URL, GARUDAX_ADMIN_EMAIL, GARUDAX_ADMIN_PASSWORD

Acceptance: `npm run build` succeeds. MCP server starts and lists 25+ tools.

tasks.title: Ticket system — backend API (gateway)
tasks.description:
Add a ticket/issue tracking system to the gateway for bug reports, customization requests, and support tickets.

Create migration `infrastructure/db/migrations/V25__tickets.sql`:
- tickets.tickets: id, title, description, category (bug_report/customization/support/feature_request), priority (low/medium/high/critical), status (open/in_progress/resolved/closed), reporter_id, assignee_id, tags[], metadata JSONB, created_at, updated_at, resolved_at
- tickets.comments: id, ticket_id, author_id, body, is_bot BOOLEAN, created_at
- Indexes on status, reporter, category, priority

Create `src/gateway/internal/tickets/` package:
- `store.go`: Store interface + PgStore + InMemoryStore
- `handlers.go`: POST/GET/PATCH /api/v1/tickets, POST /api/v1/tickets/{id}/comments, GET /api/v1/admin/tickets/stats
- `handlers_test.go`: 25+ tests

Wire routes in gateway main.go.

Acceptance: Tickets CRUD works via API. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Bot orchestrator — nano routing + Claude escalation
tasks.description:
Create the bot orchestrator that routes requests between GPT-nano (simple) and Claude CLI (complex).

Create `src/admin-bot/orchestrator/` with:
1. `package.json` with openai SDK, node-cron
2. `src/index.ts` — HTTP server on port 3100
3. `src/router.ts` — Classifies requests via GPT-nano into: status_query, admin_action, ticket_create, ticket_update, report_generate, complex_analysis. Simple → nano. Complex → Claude CLI.
4. `src/nano-handler.ts` — GPT-nano handler with function calling for simple lookups, ticket creation, status queries
5. `src/claude-handler.ts` — Spawns `claude -p "<prompt>" --bare` with MCP config, captures response, 60s timeout, 2 retries
6. `src/daily-admin.ts` — Scheduled tasks via node-cron: morning health check (09:00), EOD report, aging tickets alert
7. `src/api.ts` — Express-like HTTP routes: POST /chat, GET /suggestions, GET /health
8. `src/types.ts` — Shared types

Acceptance: Router classifies correctly. Simple queries → nano. Complex → Claude CLI.

tasks.title: Bot chat API — gateway proxy to orchestrator
tasks.description:
Add bot chat endpoints to the gateway that proxy to the orchestrator.

Create `src/gateway/internal/bot/` package:
1. `handler.go`:
   - POST /api/v1/bot/chat — { message, context? } → { reply, actions?, ticket_id? }
   - GET /api/v1/bot/suggestions?page= — context-aware quick actions
   - For MVP: built-in keyword-based responses when orchestrator is unavailable
2. `suggestions.go` — Page-aware suggestions:
   - Dashboard: "System health", "Open alerts", "Today's volume"
   - Surveillance: "Unresolved alerts", "Wash trading detections"
   - Margin: "Margin call participants", "Total shortfall"
   - Settlement: "Settlement status", "Run cycle"
   - Tickets: "Open tickets", "Aging tickets"
3. `bridge.go` — Proxy to orchestrator HTTP (BOT_ORCHESTRATOR_URL env)
4. `handler_test.go` — 20+ tests

Bot endpoints require admin auth. Wire in gateway main.go.

Acceptance: Chat endpoint returns responses. Suggestions vary by page.

tasks.title: Admin UI — floating bot button + chat panel
tasks.description:
Add floating bot button and chat panel to admin-ui.

Create:
1. `BotButton.tsx` + CSS: Floating circle, bottom-right (24px inset), z-index 1100, pulse animation on notification, robot icon, unread badge
2. `BotChatPanel.tsx` + CSS: Slide-up panel (400x500px), header with minimize/close, scrollable messages (user right-aligned blue, bot left-aligned gray), typing indicator (3 dots), text input + send button, quick action chips from suggestions API
3. `BotTicketForm.tsx` + CSS: Inline form in chat — title, description, category dropdown (bug/customization/support/feature), priority. Auto-captures current page + browser info as metadata. Shows confirmation after submit.
4. `BotContext.tsx`: Provider with state (isOpen, messages[], unreadCount, isTyping, suggestions[]), actions (sendMessage, togglePanel, loadSuggestions on route change)
5. `botApi.ts`: sendBotMessage, getBotSuggestions, createTicket, getTickets
6. Wire BotButton + BotProvider into App.tsx DashboardLayout

Follow CSS Modules + design tokens. Extract pure functions for tests.

Acceptance: Button visible on all admin pages. Chat opens/closes. Messages send. Ticket form works. 25+ tests.

tasks.title: Admin UI — ticket management page
tasks.description:
Add Tickets page to admin-ui.

Create:
1. `Tickets.tsx` + CSS: Table with ID, Title, Category, Priority, Status, Reporter, Created. Filters (category, priority, status, search). Click row → expand detail with comments. Admin actions: assign, change status/priority. Comment form. Bot comments marked with robot icon.
2. Update Sidebar.tsx: Add 'Tickets' nav item with icon
3. Update App.tsx: Add /dashboard/tickets route
4. Update api.ts: fetchTickets, fetchTicket, updateTicket, addTicketComment, fetchTicketStats
5. Tests: tickets.test.ts with 20+ tests for pure functions

Acceptance: Tickets page works. CRUD via UI. Tests pass.

tasks.title: MCP server — ticket + daily admin tools extension
tasks.description:
Extend MCP server with ticket management and daily admin tools.

Add to `src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/`:
1. `tickets.ts`: create_ticket, list_tickets, update_ticket, add_comment, get_ticket_stats
2. `daily_admin.ts`: run_daily_health_check, run_eod_report, get_aging_tickets, get_unresolved_alerts_summary

Add MCP resources:
3. `src/resources/tickets.ts`: open_tickets, ticket_stats

Acceptance: New tools visible in MCP. Claude CLI can manage tickets via MCP.

tasks.title: Docker Compose + Dockerfiles for bot services
tasks.description:
Add bot services to Docker Compose stack.

1. Create `src/admin-bot/mcp-server/Dockerfile` — Node 22 slim, npm ci, npm run build
2. Create `src/admin-bot/orchestrator/Dockerfile` — Node 22 slim, npm ci, npm run build, EXPOSE 3100
3. Update `docker-compose.yml`:
   - admin-bot-orchestrator service: build, env (OPENAI_API_KEY, gateway URL, credentials), port 3100, depends_on gateway
   - Update gateway env: BOT_ORCHESTRATOR_URL=http://admin-bot-orchestrator:3100

Acceptance: `docker compose up` starts bot services. Bot API reachable through gateway.

tasks.title: Bot + ticket integration tests
tasks.description:
Write tests for the full bot system.

Create:
1. `src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/__tests__/router.test.ts` — request classification, nano vs claude routing, fallback
2. `src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/__tests__/nano-handler.test.ts` — health queries, ticket creation, mock API
3. `src/admin-bot/orchestrator/src/__tests__/daily-admin.test.ts` — report generation, schedule config
4. `src/admin-ui/src/__tests__/bot-chat.test.ts` — BotContext, BotButton render/toggle, BotTicketForm validation, botApi functions
5. `src/gateway/internal/bot/handler_test.go` — chat endpoint, suggestions, auth

Acceptance: All test suites pass. >60% coverage.
